name: dotforge-stack-vps-ssh
description: SSH/VPS deployment — remote host conventions, key management, and rsync/scp patterns for bare-metal or self-hosted deploys (Oracle Free Tier, Hetzner, DigitalOcean).
note: Composes with docker-deploy when the VPS also runs Docker. Adds domain/infra.md as a canonical home for Host/User/Key/AppDir/DeployCmd — NOT ephemeral session state.
